metadata.name: Nextcloud
metadata.description: Self-hosted file sync and share platform, similar to Dropbox, with built-in collaboration tools, calendar, contacts, and extensible app ecosystem.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Self-hosted file sync and share platform, similar to Dropbox, with built-in collaboration tools, calendar, contacts, and extensible app ecosystem.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` and `.env` as files.

1. Decide on service names, ports, volumes, credentials, and optional integrations before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the required variables first, then enable optional sections such as Traefik, metrics, or extra services only when needed.
3. Render the Compose project, review the generated files, and start it with Docker Compose in the target directory.

## Variable Guide
### Database
- `database_type`: Database type (Nextcloud supports PostgreSQL or MySQL/MariaDB); optional; default: postgres; options: postgres, mysql.
- `database_name`: Name of the database; required; default: nextcloud.
- `database_user`: Username for the database; required; default: nextcloud.
- `database_password`: Password for the database; required.

### General
- `service_name`: Name of the service; optional; default: nextcloud.
- `container_name`: Name to use for the container; optional; default: nextcloud.
- `container_timezone`: Timezone used inside the container; optional.
- `restart_policy`: Policy used for Restart; required; default: unless-stopped; options: unless-stopped, always, on-failure, no.

### Traefik
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_host`: Hostname used for Traefik; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Domain used for Traefik; required.
- `traefik_entrypoint`: Traefik entrypoint name; optional; default: .
- `traefik_network`: Network used for Traefik; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_tls_entrypoint`: Traefik TLS entrypoint name; optional; default: ; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.

### Network
- `network_mode`: Mode used for Network; optional; default: bridge; options: bridge, macvlan.
- `network_macvlan_ipv4_address_db`: Static IP address for database container (macvlan only); optional; default: IP_ADDRESS; shown when: network_mode=macvlan.

### Ports
- `ports_http`: Host port for HTTP; optional; default: 80.

### Nextcloud
- `admin_user`: Username for the nextcloud admin; optional; default: admin.
- `admin_password`: Password for the nextcloud admin; optional.

## References
- [Nextcloud](https://nextcloud.com/)
- [Documentation](https://docs.nextcloud.com/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/nextcloud/server)
